name: dashboard-shell
title: Dashboard Shell
description: App frame for clinical dashboards: an optional fixed sidebar, a sticky header, and a centered scrolling content region. Compose a DashboardGrid inside.

props.name: sidebar
props.description: Left nav column; hidden below lg (render a mobile nav in header).

props.name: header
props.description: Sticky top bar — patient banner, search, user menu.

clinicalNotes: The header is sticky so the patient banner (name, MRN, allergies) stays on screen while a clinician scrolls a long chart — a core patient-safety pattern. The sidebar collapses below lg for bedside tablet use; provide an equivalent mobile nav in the header so navigation is never lost. Bring your own routing/active state — the shell is presentational.
notes: Layer-M0 scaffolding. The outer frame of every M3 block.
